Complete medical diagnosis

The advances of electromagnetic medicine at your fingertips

Scar blockage
Toxic overload
Electromagnetic stress

Knowing the deep cause of your disease

In our clinic, each consultation is based on a comprehensive medical diagnosis, as it is the indispensable pillar for successful treatment. For this, we integrate the advanced MORA Bio-Resonance technology, which reveals the root of the imbalance, with traditional medicine methods to obtain a global vision.

Non-Invasive Method

We identify the origin of your symptoms without needles or uncomfortable procedures.

Precise Identification

We discover which specific toxics, toxins, allergens or pathogens affect your wellbeing and their subsequent elimination.

Integral Vision

We analyze your body as an interconnected whole, not as isolated parts.

Answers

We detect imbalances even when conventional analysis shows nothing.

How is MORA Bio-resonance used for Diagnosis?

MORA Bio-resonance is an advanced medical diagnosis method that allows us to go beyond symptoms to identify the original cause of the imbalance in the organism. It is based on a key principle of biophysics: every cell, tissue and organ of your body emits a specific and measurable electromagnetic frequency that reflects its functional state.

Diagnosis through frequencies

We can understand this system as a «translator» of the language of your cells:

  • When you are healthy, the frequencies you emit are ordered and coherent, forming a pattern of harmonic vibrations.
  • When an illness exists, even before it manifests in conventional analysis, these vibrations are distorted. Factors such as toxins, allergens, pathogens or stress create interferences, generating inharmonic or pathological vibrations.

The MORA Bio-resonance equipment is capable of reading this entire spectrum of vibrations. Its extraordinary precision allows it to differentiate healthy signals from pathological ones, acting as a bioenergetic scanner that reveals:

  • The Root Cause: Identifies which specific toxins, allergens, heavy metals or microorganisms are altering your health.
  • The State of Organs: Evaluates the functionality of organs and systems, detecting energetic blockages or weaknesses.
  • Hidden Imbalances: Discovers nutrient deficiencies, food intolerances or interfering foci (such as scars or dental problems) that often go unnoticed.

In summary, MORA Bio-resonance provides us with an incredibly detailed functional map of your current health state. Thanks to this information, we can perform a holistic and accurate diagnosis that goes directly to the origin of the problem, allowing us to design a truly effective and personalized treatment.

Real medicine without time limits

Quality medical care is not measured in minutes, but in results. As a private practice, we have the freedom to dedicate the necessary time to each patient, ensuring a rigorous diagnosis and human treatment that makes the difference. This philosophy, built on more than 40 years of experience, ensures that you will be listened to and that your case will be analyzed with the depth you deserve, which involves:

  • Your medical history: Past illnesses, surgeries, treatments received.
  • Your family history: Genetic predispositions that could influence your current health.
  • Your personal history: Your lifestyle, your environment, your diet, your stress level and your emotional state.

Our Main Treatments

Homeopathic Medicine

Recover your health addressing the root of your diseases.

Stop Smoking Treatment

Quit smoking in a single session. Natural and effective with bio-frequencies.

Complete Detoxification

Free your body from toxics, bacterial and viral loads, vaccine side effects and persistent Covid.

Family Medicine

Children, allergies, asthma and digestive disorders such as intolerances, etc.

“Before curing anyone, ask him if he is willing to give up the things that made him sick.”

— Hippocrates

“Health depends on being in harmony with our souls.”

— Edward Bach

“Medicine must integrate body, soul and spirit so that the treatment is true and lasting.”

— Rudolf Steiner

“The true doctor not only prescribes, but listens, understands and guides towards balance.”

— Anonymous

“Homeopathy does not treat diseases, but people who are sick.”

— André Saine

“The body whispers before it screams; the attentive doctor listens to the silence of the disease before it manifests.”

— Proposed Quote

“Technology heals, chemistry acts, but the soul is cured in the presence of love and listening.”

— Proposed Quote

“The physician's high and only mission is to restore the sick to health, to cure, as it is termed.”

— Samuel Hahnemann

“The good physician treats the disease; the great physician treats the patient who has the disease.”

— William Osler
